/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -pthread -Wl,-z,defs -fvisibility=hidden -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/lib -Wl,--enable-new-dtags -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/matrix_ops_component.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libmatrix_ops.so -o libmatrix_ops.so CMakeFiles/matrix_ops_component.dir/components/matrix_ops.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/arpit/hpx/src/hpx-1.10.0/build/lib:/opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib: /home/arpit/hpx/src/hpx-1.10.0/build/lib/libhpx.so.1.10.0 /home/arpit/hpx/src/hpx-1.10.0/build/lib/libhpx_core.so /usr/lib/libmpi.so /usr/lib/libhwloc.so /opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /usr/lib/librt.a /opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcublas.so /opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcublasLt.so /opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libculibos.a -ldl -lrt
